name: best-of-n-fix-v2
description: V2 best-of-N fix prototype: three isolated delegate attempts in managed worktrees followed by read-only comparison. Describe task in BEST_OF_N_TASK.md. Human selects; no auto-merge.

tasks.prompt: Read BEST_OF_N_TASK.md if present. Implement one minimal solution in this managed worktree. Report changed files and validation.
Read BEST_OF_N_TASK.md if present. Implement an independent minimal solution in this managed worktree. Report changed files and validation.
Read BEST_OF_N_TASK.md if present. Implement a third independent minimal solution in this managed worktree. Report changed files and validation.

stages.prompt: Compare the attempt outputs, worktree paths, risks, and validation evidence. Recommend one option for a human to inspect and merge manually. Do not merge or modify files.
